blocks.text: Ventura sits T50 and Reitan T77 after round two at TPC San Antonio — both Norwegians need a weekend charge with Augusta just days away. Zalatoris leads at -6.
Barcelona meet Atlético twice in five days — La Liga then Europe

Barça lead Real Madrid by four points with nine games left — Saturday's trip to the Metropolitano is a title-race statement. Then Wednesday, the same opponents collide again in the Champions League quarterfinals.
🎾 Sun 06:00 — Monte-Carlo Masters begins, first clay major of the season
🎮 Mon 02:00 — PGL CS2 Major Bucharest opens, Norwegian rain (Håvard Nygaard) competing
